ab: ko talragili siya ’Alri, miya lalake ki Ngodradrekai.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Alri，他也是魯凱族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Alri, and he is also an Rukai child.

ab: wamaelrelrenai ikai ki cekelenai Taromak twakesikesi.
en: We study together in the Taromak tribe.

ab: tara maelrelrenai kilalalra ki tarwarodrang lo tomaowlawlay, miya malrigilinai sinTaromakakaana.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說東魯凱語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Rukai proficiently.

ab: mabelrengako si kabitolro, ko ’Alri malebe si karilai.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Alri很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Alri is short and thin.

ab: ko ’Alri wa’ararakenga, madalamenai makanaelre ki iniya.
ch: Alri很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Alri is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
